title: Trichopuntia shaferi
uses: Trichopuntia shaferi, also known as Shafer's cholla, is a species of cactus found in the southwestern United States and Mexico. taxonomy: Trichopuntia shaferi is a species of cactus that belongs to the family Cactaceae. It is a type of pitaya or dragon fruit cactus, specifically classified as Trichocereus shaferi and then later reclassified as Trichopuntia shaferi.
